test_cases.description: Verifies skill recommends appropriate playbook based on product type
test_cases.input: I have a CRM that integrates with 50 different tools. What programmatic SEO strategy should I use?

test_cases.description: Verifies skill enforces unique value per page and warns against thin content
test_cases.input: I want to generate 10,000 city pages for my cleaning service that just swap the city name in the template

test_cases.description: Verifies skill recommends subfolders over subdomains for programmatic pages
test_cases.input: Should I use templates.mysite.com/resume or mysite.com/templates/resume for my programmatic SEO pages?
